info.title: Kurator API
info.description:
REST API for Kurator: collections, items, search, external metadata lookup, session-based auth, bundled SQL migrations with first-boot bootstrap, and optional S3-backed image uploads.

**Authentication:** Sessions are opaque tokens stored hashed in the database. The API accepts (1) the **kurator_session** HTTP-only cookie (typical browser flow via the Next.js same-origin proxy) or (2) **`Authorization: Bearer <session_token>`** on any protected route. When both are present, the **cookie wins**. After **POST /api/v1/auth/register**, **POST /api/v1/auth/login** (when 2FA is not required), or **POST /api/v1/auth/login/2fa**, the JSON body includes **session_token** — the same secret as the cookie — for native and non-cookie clients. **POST /api/v1/auth/logout** revokes the session for either mechanism; browsers also receive `Set-Cookie` clearing the cookie.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Registration, login, logout, password recovery, beta invite access. Session delivery: `Set-Cookie: kurator_session` plus JSON `session_token`. Authenticated API calls: cookie and/or `Authorization: Bearer <session_token>` (cookie preferred if both sent).

tags.name: notifications
tags.description: In-app notification feed and read state (requires session).

tags.name: shelf-share
tags.description: Shared shelves: join requests, invites, access request decisions.

tags.name: collections
tags.description: Collections (shelves); list visibility rules depend on session for some scopes.

SessionCookie.name: kurator_session
SessionCookie.description: HTTP-only session cookie set on successful register/login/2fa. Preferred when both cookie and Authorization Bearer are present.

BearerToken.name: Authorization
BearerToken.description: Bearer followed by the opaque session_token from POST /auth/login, /auth/login/2fa, or /auth/register (same secret as the kurator_session cookie). Example: Bearer <session_token>

post.description: Creates the user, returns profile fields and **session_token**, and sets **kurator_session** (HTTP-only). Native clients should persist **session_token** and send **Authorization: Bearer** on subsequent requests.

201.description: Created; response extends User with session_token

post.description: If 2FA is required, returns **pending_token** (no session yet). Otherwise returns **user** and **session_token**, sets **kurator_session**, and native clients may use Bearer with **session_token**.

200.description: Either two_factor_required + pending_token, or two_factor_required false + user + session_token

post.description: Completes login after **POST /auth/login** returned **two_factor_required** and **pending_token**. Returns **user**, **session_token**, and sets **kurator_session**.
Invalidates the session from **kurator_session** cookie or **Authorization: Bearer**. Clears the session cookie when present.

post.summary: Reactivate a deactivated account within the grace period

get.summary: Shared shelves for account deletion UI

delete.description: Invalidates all sessions. Optional JSON body lists voluntary ownership transfers for shared shelves.

post.summary: Accept shelf ownership after owner account deletion (sole collaborator)
Vote for new shelf owner after owner account deletion (election)

get.description: Lightweight poll endpoint for the activity bell badge. Does not return notification rows.

post.description: When beta enforcement is enabled. Queues email and may notify admins.

get.description: HTML response; validates emailed admin token query param `t`.
Sets beta unlock cookie and redirects to registration.

post.description: Provide totp_code (2FA on) or email_code (2FA off). Revokes all sessions on success.

post.summary: Request to join a shared shelf
Invite users to a shared shelf
Approve a pending shelf access request
Dismiss a pending shelf access request

get.description: Recently updated collections, lists, and wishlists for the signed-in user.
userRef is numeric user id or username.
Without owner_user_id requires session (own lists). With owner_user_id, optional session for visibility.

schema.description: name, description, visibility, is_public, is_shared, invite_user_ids

get.description: Without owner_user_id requires session. With owner_user_id, optional session for visibility.

schema.description: name, description, target_collection_id, visibility, cover_art_url, is_shared, invite_user_ids

post.summary: Materialize wishlist entry as collection item

get.description: Optional session for visibility on private items.
Lists the viewer may see that reference this item.

RegisterResponse.description: Public user profile fields returned on registration, plus session_token for Bearer auth.

session_token.description: Opaque session secret; send as Authorization: Bearer <session_token>. Same value as kurator_session cookie body.

LoginResponse.description: Password login result: either 2FA challenge or completed session.

pending_token.description: Present when two_factor_required is true; use with POST /auth/login/2fa

session_token.description: Present when two_factor_required is false; Bearer token and same as kurator_session cookie
Opaque session secret for Authorization: Bearer
